key.name: scan-directories
key.description: List of directories that the application will scan recursively to find movie files.

key.name: omdb-api-key
key.description: API key for OMDb (Open Movie Database) used to fetch movie metadata and posters.

key.name: opensubtitles-api-key
key.description: API key for OpenSubtitles used to search and download subtitles.

key.name: preferred-audio-language
key.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the preferred audio track language.

key.name: preferred-subtitle-language
key.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the preferred subtitle language.

key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the main application window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the main application window in pixels.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized in the last session.

key.name: subtitle-font-desc
key.description: Pango font description for subtitle rendering (e.g. "Sans 18", "DejaVu Serif Bold 20").

key.name: sort-mode
key.description: The last selected sorting mode for the movie catalog.
